styleGuide.visualDirection: Cute snake-burrow mobile game UI with clean cutout edges, high readability, warm earthy palette, no noisy texture.
constraints: No watermark or text baked into icon assets

assets.prompt: Create a portrait mobile game lobby background for a cute snake burrow puzzle game, 430x932 ratio, warm green and soil tones, subtle depth, no text, no characters in foreground.
Create a soft rounded UI panel texture, transparent background, warm wood/grass style, clean edge, suitable for popups.
Create a wide rounded game button skin, transparent background, high contrast center area for text, cute cartoon style.
Create a compact rounded feature card badge for mobile game menu, transparent background, bright and readable.
Create a cute settings icon (gear) for snake-themed game UI, transparent background, bold silhouette.
Create a cute leaderboard icon (trophy or rank badge), transparent background, game UI style.
Create a cute skins/customization icon (palette or shirt badge), transparent background, game UI style.
Create a cute daily check-in icon (calendar + reward), transparent background, game UI style.
Create a cute exit icon (door or arrow out), transparent background, game UI style.
Create a cute home icon for mobile puzzle game, transparent background.
Create a cute coin icon for snake puzzle game UI, transparent background.
Create a cute energy icon (leaf or lightning), transparent background, game UI style.
